canonical_definition: A benchmark covering 162 concrete sub-tasks from existing datasets, primarily focused on perception and using a multiple-choice question format.
papers: MEGA-Bench: Scaling Multimodal Evaluation to over 500 Real-World Tasks
MME-RealWorld: Could Your Multimodal LLM Challenge High-Resolution Real-World Scenarios that are Difficult for Humans?
